title: 皐月賞の後に・メラメラなんばーわん

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon fails to seize victory in the Satsuki
Sho and must give up center stage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She shakes off her frustration and takes the stage
with a big smile on her face, where she feels her
dream taking on a clear shape.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next time, she vows to win and take center stage
at a dirt race that, like the Satsuki Sho, can only
be entered in classic year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next goal is the Japan Dirt Derby, one of the
few classic-year G1 races on dirt.
